projectDescription: CodeAtlas is a full-stack SaaS application that transforms GitHub repositories into AI-powered interactive architectural documentation and knowledge maps using Google Gemini.
keyFeatures: AI-powered architectural analysis using Google Gemini to generate structured documentation from raw source code
Automated OWASP Top 10 security auditing with file-level vulnerability mapping and fix proposals
Real-time ingestion job tracking with progress updates through a five-stage pipeline (PENDING → CLONING → ANALYZING → SECURITY_AUDIT → COMPLETED)
Interactive 3D knowledge map visualization built with Three.js for exploring codebase structure
Vector embeddings for semantic search across documentation nodes using Gemini embeddings
Supabase-backed authentication with JWT validation, rate limiting (5 ingestions per 15 minutes), and row-level security
Monorepo architecture with shared TypeScript/Zod schemas across frontend and backend
Admin panel for managing projects and reviewing/editing AI-generated documentation nodes
publicApiSurface: POST /api/projects — Ingest new repository (requires Bearer token auth)
GET /api/jobs/:id — Poll job status and progress
ProjectService — project lifecycle and metadata management
JobService — job state machine and progress tracking
SecurityService.runSecurityAudit() — OWASP vulnerability detection via Gemini
GeminiService.generateStructuredJson() — structured JSON generation with retry logic
PersistenceService — data persistence and embedding generation
RepoContextService — file scanning and context assembly
